# PII Tokenizer Script Coverage Audit

This committed audit covers 978 PII-family models across 11 script targets. The unsupported threshold is strictly greater than 1% UNK tokens on a script claimed by the model's declared language.

- Model-script pairs above the UNK threshold: 6339
- Claimed model-script pairs marked unsupported: 76
